sections.paragraph:
θέω (Hom.+) run w. acc. of place (Ps.-X., Cyneg. 4, 6 τὰ ὄρη) θ. τὴν ὁδὸν τὴν εὐθεῖαν run the straight course 2 Cl 7:3. DELG s.v. 1 θέω.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

acc. acc. = accusative

Ps. Ps. = pseudo, pseudonymous

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

2 Cl 2 Cl = 2 Clement—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 454
